heroText: Dependable residential and commercial electrical services throughout Voorheesville and the Capital Region.
aboutHeadline: Built on pride, skill, and honest work.
aboutStory: Ryan started in the electrical trade working for a local commercial electrical company, learning the work from the ground up. He later enrolled in the electrician program at HVCC, where he advanced quickly and built a strong foundation in the trade. Shortly after his father's heart attack, Ryan came to his family with a plan to start his own business. They encouraged him to try. Three years later, Voorheesville Electric has become a trusted name for homeowners and businesses throughout Voorheesville and the Capital District. Ryan takes pride in doing clean, dependable work for an honest price — applying a skilled trade with a long history, real local value, and craftsmanship that cannot be outsourced.
mission: To deliver safe, dependable electrical solutions while treating every customer and property with professionalism and respect.
serviceAreaIntro: Based in Voorheesville and proudly serving homeowners and businesses throughout Albany County and the greater Capital Region.
